meaning: n.{食}(制酥点用的)制成极薄层的生面
examples: Filo (or phyllo) dough comes in fresh or frozen paper-thin layers and is similar to strudel pastry.
Brush a third piece phyllo with butter and top the previous one, also at an angle.
Brush top side of one piece of phyllo lightly with melted butter using a pastry brush.
Brush with the remaining melted butter and bake for about 20 minutes, until the phyllo is golden.
